data.title: Halfpricesoft releases 2026 ezPaycheck for OBBBA federal tax changes. Helps businesses adapt to new rules. Reported on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: The updated ezPaycheck payroll software has been designed to assist businesses of all sizes in adjusting to the latest withholding regulations, employer credits, and reporting standards introduced by the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA). The software, based in REDMOND, Wash., offers comprehensive support in compliance with the new legislation. The Act, dated February 17, 2026, has brought significant changes impacting businesses, and the enhanced ezPaycheck software aims to streamline payroll processes for organizations facing these modifications. The software update is expected to benefit a wide range of businesses by simplifying payroll operations and ensuring adherence to the updated regulations under the OBBBA.

data.title: Amentum will assist UK in hypersonic strike capabilities under IMP contract, enhancing collaboration with AUKUS partners.
data.description: Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) based in Chantilly, Va., has secured a contract to offer missile design engineering and program management services to support the UK's hypersonic strike capabilities. This contract, dubbed Industry Mission Partner (IMP), was granted by Team Hypersonics UK under the Ministry of Defence. The aim is to expedite weapon development and enhance sovereign capability. This move also strengthens cooperation with Australia and the United States under the AUKUS agreement. Amentum is tasked with establishing a Joint (J) platform to facilitate this endeavor.

data.title: RWS wins 'Outstanding IP Service Team in China' award for the fourth consecutive year at the Beijing conference. #RWS #IPServiceTeam #China
data.description: RWS, a global AI solutions company headquartered in Maidenhead, England, has recently been recognized as the Outstanding IP Service Team in China 2025. The prestigious award was presented at the Enterprise IP Strategy Forum and Annual Conference of In-house IP Managers held in Beijing. This marks the fourth consecutive year that RWS's China team has received this accolade, having also won in 2022, 2023, and 2024. The selection criteria for the award included evaluations of professional capability, business processes, and intellectual property research expertise. This recognition highlights RWS's continued excellence in the field of intellectual property services.

data.title: Expereo chosen to unify connectivity for Kingspan Insulation across 90 global sites, enabling growth and consolidating ISPs.
data.description: Expereo, the global leader in managed Network as a Service (NaaS), recently disclosed that Kingspan Insulation, a renowned manufacturer of top-grade insulation products and systems worldwide, has opted for Expereo’s services to establish a fully managed connectivity solution throughout its global footprint. This collaboration with Expereo allows Kingspan Insulation to streamline its intricate network of various ISPs into a unified, centralized system, enhancing operational efficiency. This strategic decision underscores the significance of connectivity solutions in modern business operations and signifies Expereo’s prowess in delivering such services across the globe.

data.title: Insurance AI firm mea Platform secures $50M investment from SEP to enhance industry ratios and margins.
data.description: Bermuda-based mea Platform, an AI-native insurance technology firm, revealed today a $50 million minority growth equity investment from SEP, a prominent investor in enterprise technology firms. Established in 2021, mea has been a key player in the AI application within the insurance sector. The company's products are experiencing increasing demand due to their ability to swiftly enhance combined ratios and bolster margins. Despite being bootstrapped until now, mea is currently in its fourth year of operation.

data.title: FICO UK report: December 2025 shows highest card balances, stable payments. New year may bring financial stress.
data.description: In London, analysis of credit card data for December 2025 by global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO) revealed typical seasonal spending trends, but with balances at the highest level ever recorded. Payments remained steady despite this. As consumers often confront their Christmas expenses at the beginning of the year, there is a possibility of heightened financial strain. The data suggests a potential increase in financial stress in the new year due to high spending.

data.title: SPS named global outsourcing leader for 14th year by IAOP. Specializes in technology-enabled business process solutions.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Zurich, SPS, a prominent worldwide outsourcing company offering technology-driven business process solutions and services to facilitate hybrid work setups, disclosed its inclusion in the International Association of Outsourcing Professionals' prestigious list.

data.title: Planet Classroom launches podcast with UN Ambassador Shea Gopaul discussing AI in jobs. AI speeds up in industries, raising global concerns on fairness and skills.
data.description: In a recent episode of AI for a Better World, the focus was on the current impact of AI on jobs. The episode delved into how AI is enhancing various professions, identifying areas that are experiencing challenges, and highlighting the necessary steps required to uphold fairness, skill development, and opportunities. With AI rapidly advancing in multiple sectors, a pressing global concern arises: Can AI...

data.title: dss+ expands into Greece to support industrial growth and sustainability. Announcement made on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: GENEVA, Feb. 17, 2026 - Today, dss+, a prominent provider of operations management consulting services, revealed plans to enhance its footprint in Greece. This strategic move aligns with the country's drive towards industrial advancement, sustainability, and operational efficiency. The expansion signifies a pivotal moment in dss+'s journey, leveraging its expertise to support Greece's industrial growth. This development capitalizes on the company's extensive experience, establishing a stronger foothold in a burgeoning market. The decision is set to bolster dss+'s impact, contributing to its operational excellence and commitment to sustainable practices.

data.title: hackajob's AI recruiting agent Archer exceeds $1M ARR in 90 days, now expanded across all knowledge-worker roles, revolutionizing hiring process with candidate qualification before reaching ATS.
data.description: Archer, an innovative AI recruiting agent from hackajob, is tackling the challenge of overwhelming hiring processes by pre-qualifying candidates before they enter the ATS. Recent reports from London on Feb 17, 2026, reveal that Archer has achieved a significant milestone by exceeding $1 million in annual recurring revenue. This approach aims to streamline the hiring process by effectively managing the vast amount of AI-generated noise that often inundates recruitment efforts.

data.title: Mintos aims for ECB banking license, a strategic move to boost operations.
data.description: In Riga, Latvia on February 17, 2026, Mintos, a multi-asset investment platform in Europe, has begun the formal procedure to apply for a banking license from the European Central Bank (ECB). This move marks a significant advancement in Mintos's overall strategy. The banking license acquisition aims to reinforce the company's position...

data.title: Unilever and Google Cloud partner for next-gen consumer goods technologies, five-year deal announced on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: A significant collaboration has been formed between Unilever and Google Cloud, aiming to advance technology and agentic commerce. This landmark partnership, unveiled on February 17, 2026, will span five years. The alliance will bring together Unilever's renowned global brands with Google Cloud's AI capabilities. The partnership is set to drive innovation and enhance the use of cutting-edge technology in the industry. This collaboration marks a strategic move by both companies to leverage their strengths and propel advancements in commerce.
